title: kleinia mexicana
intro: Kleinia mexicana, also known as the "Mexican Kleinia" or "Mexican Daisy", is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Kleinia mexicana include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Kleinia mexicana can be made by drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
